title: Sandwichable Unofficial Port
body:
## About
### **Sanwichable for 1.21**
- [**Sanwichable**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sandwichable) is a mod that can **customize sandwich** through all kinds of stuffings!
  
- The original mod **stopped on 1.20**. So this unofficial port will **make it accessible for 1.21**

- Protential bugs may occour as Minecraft completely **remade the NBT component system** in version 1.21. So all of the logics were rewritten.
- [PLZ report if you find any issues!](https://github.com/NightEpiphany/Sandwichable-1.21/issues)


# ![Sandwichable](https://github.com/FoundationGames/MinecraftUtilsDownloads/raw/master/sandwichable/logo_1.png)


**Making a Sandwich**
1. Craft a **Sandwich Table**.
2. Gather some **Bread**. You may slice it up on a Cutting Board.
3. Find some ingredients for your sandwich. If you can, slice them up so they can restore more overall hunger.
4. Place (Right-Click) your **Bread** on the **Sandwich Table**, and stack your ingredients on top.   Make the sandwich as tall as you want! Top it off with one last piece of Bread.  
5. With an empty hand, sneak and right-click on the Sandwich Table. A completed Sandwich will pop right off!
6. You can place your **Sandwich** by sneaking, or eat it whole.
